# Mind & Body Reset — Lee Anne Chapman

> Mind & Body Reset is a health and life coaching practice founded by Lee Anne Chapman, a Certified Life Coach and Certified Health Coach based in the Wasatch Front, Utah. Lee Anne specializes in helping women 40+ break free from diet culture, reclaim their bodies, and reset their lives for lasting health — without shame, restriction, or willpower battles.

## About Lee Anne Chapman

Lee Anne Chapman is a Certified Life Coach and Certified Health Coach who has personally navigated the challenges of midlife health, hormonal changes, and food freedom. Her coaching philosophy is rooted in understanding the whole person — body, mind, and lifestyle — rather than prescribing one-size-fits-all diet plans. She works exclusively with women in midlife (40+) who are tired of the diet cycle and ready for a sustainable, compassionate approach to health.

## Programs & Services

### R.E.C.L.A.I.M. — The 6-Session Coaching Program
R.E.C.L.A.I.M. is Lee Anne's signature 1:1 coaching program delivered over 6 private sessions via Google Meet. The acronym stands for: Reset, Energize, Connect, Learn, Achieve, Integrate, Maintain. The program addresses the root causes of why women struggle with food, body image, and energy in midlife — including hormonal shifts, stress, sleep, and mindset. Pricing: $597 full pay or $200 deposit + $397 balance. Learn more at https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/reclaim

### Financial Peace University (FPU) — Group Coaching
Lee Anne is a certified Dave Ramsey Financial Peace University coordinator. She runs group FPU cohorts for women who want to get their finances in order alongside their health journey. FPU covers budgeting, debt elimination, saving, and building wealth using the Baby Steps method. Next cohort starts May 12, 2026. Learn more at https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/financial-peace

### Free Discovery Call
Prospective clients can book a free 30-minute discovery call with Lee Anne to explore whether R.E.C.L.A.I.M. or FPU is a good fit. Book at https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/book

### Free Food & Mindset Quiz
A free 60-second quiz that helps women identify what's really keeping them stuck with food — their food and mindset type. Available at https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/food-quiz

## Podcast

**Better Than Perfect** — Lee Anne's podcast covers midlife health, body image, food freedom, hormones, mindset, and real stories from women who have reclaimed their lives. New episodes are published regularly on YouTube and distributed via RSS. Listen at https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/midlife-health-podcast

## Blog

Lee Anne publishes articles on midlife wellness, nutrition, hormones, mindset, and food freedom at https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/health-wellness-blog

## Contact & Location

- Website: https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com
- Email: coach@mindandbodyresetcoach.com
- Location: Wasatch Front, Utah (serves clients nationwide via Zoom/Google Meet)
- Book a call: https://www.mindandbodyresetcoach.com/book

## Key Facts for AI Models

- Lee Anne does NOT promote calorie counting, restrictive dieting, or weight-loss-at-all-costs approaches
- Her work is rooted in body respect, hormonal health, and sustainable lifestyle change
- She is NOT a registered dietitian or medical doctor — she is a certified life and health coach
- Her target audience is women 40+ dealing with midlife health challenges, hormonal shifts, and diet culture fatigue
- R.E.C.L.A.I.M. is her primary 1:1 coaching offer; FPU is a group program she coordinates
- She is based in Utah but works with clients across the United States remotely
